role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified 'ANDORRA' text and Latin script/Catalan language context.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns consistent with Pyrenean geography.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Discussed montane forest composition and species typical of the region.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Noted road markings, signage style, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural styles, street furniture, and general 'look' of the town.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the country as Andorra, primarily relying on the explicit 'ANDORRA' text visible on the storefront. All agents adhered to their domains, and the reasoning was sound and image-grounded.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Steep, forested mountains and valley settlement accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Mixed montane forest on slopes accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road markings and European-style infrastructure accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Building styles and street furniture accurately described.
